hero.max_rank_skill_tips_translated: Active Elevation: Upgrades Rift Slash to Ultra-Rift Slash damage
hero.max_rank_skill_desc_translated: *Ultra-Rift Slash: This skill cannot CRIT, causing DMG Increase 30% and additional damage of CRIT DMG50%. When you have He Blade Breakthrough, the target's DEF will be regarded as 0

skills.name: tid#SkillName_ActiveSkill_lv1
skills.desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage equal to #Factor_1# of ATK to the target.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage equal to #Factor_1# of ATK to the target.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Rift Slash: This skill cannot CRIT, and will cause additional damage of CRIT DMG 30%. When you have He Blade Breakthrough, the target's DEF will be regarded as 0
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Ultra-Rift Slash: This skill cannot CRIT, causing DMG Increase 30% and additional damage of CRIT DMG50%. When you have He Blade Breakthrough, the target's DEF will be regarded as 0

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1116_p1
skills.desc_short_translated: After an allied CCG character casts an active skill, gain stacks of #Entry_1# equal to the skill's level, up to 10 stacks. At 10 stacks, consume all #Entry_1# and gain #Entry_2# for 5 turns. Cannot gain #Entry_1# during #Entry_2#
skills.max_desc_short_translated: After an allied CCG character casts an active skill, gain stacks of #Entry_1# equal to the skill's level, up to 10 stacks. At 10 stacks, consume all #Entry_1# and gain #Entry_2# for 5 turns. Cannot gain #Entry_1# during #Entry_2#

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1116_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: Each time there are 1 CCG characters on our side, the basic ability value of all our team will be increased by 5%, and the damage and additional damage received will be reduced by 4%. When we obtain #Entry_1#, our team will be relieved and immune to all blocking effects and weak effects. The immunity effect lasts for 1 turns.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Each time there are 1 CCG characters on our side, the basic ability value of all our team will be increased by 5%, and the damage and additional damage received will be reduced by 4%. When we obtain #Entry_1#, our team will be relieved and immune to all blocking effects and weak effects. The immunity effect lasts for 1 turns.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Kagune Edge Ascension: The critical hit damage of all our team members is increased by 60%, and the basic ability value is increased by 25%. When our character releases a single skill attack, it will cause additional damage of the carrier's critical hit damage 40%. When releasing all skills to attack, it will cause additional damage of the carrier's critical hit damage 15%.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Kagune Edge Ascension: The critical hit damage of all our team members is increased by 60%, and the basic ability value is increased by 25%. When our character releases a single skill attack, it will cause additional damage of the carrier's critical hit damage 40%. When releasing all skills to attack, it will cause additional damage of the carrier's critical hit damage 15%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1116_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: When our character receives fatal damage, he will immediately gain 3 #Entry_1#. If he is already in #Entry_2#, he will immediately cause #Entry_3# damage with attack power 280% to the enemy with the highest attack power. This damage ignores all damage reduction effects on the target.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When our character receives fatal damage, he will immediately gain 3 #Entry_1#. If he is already in #Entry_2#, he will immediately cause #Entry_3# damage with attack power 280% to the enemy with the highest attack power. This damage ignores all damage reduction effects on the target.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_burst_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases all aliied characters' basic stats by 5% for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases all aliied characters' basic stats by 5% for 1 turn.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1116_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: Each time there are 1 CCG characters on our side, the basic abilities of all our sides will increase by 5%, and the damage and additional damage received will decrease by 4%. When you get #Entry_1# , so that all of our party will be relieved and immune to all blocking effects and weak effects. The immunity effect lasts for 1 turns, and at the same time, all of our party will gain a shield with a maximum health value of 15% for 1 turns.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Each time there are 1 CCG characters on our side, the basic abilities of all our sides will increase by 5%, and the damage and additional damage received will decrease by 4%. When you get #Entry_1# , so that all of our party will be relieved and immune to all blocking effects and weak effects. The immunity effect lasts for 1 turns, and at the same time, all of our party will gain a shield with a maximum health value of 15% for 1 turns.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Kagune Edge Ascension: The critical hit damage of all our team members is increased by 60%, and the basic ability value is increased by 25%. When our character releases a single skill attack, it will cause additional damage of the carrier's critical hit damage 40%. When releasing all skills to attack, it will cause additional damage of the carrier's critical hit damage 15%.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Kagune Edge Ascension: The critical hit damage of all our team members is increased by 60%, and the basic ability value is increased by 25%. When our character releases a single skill attack, it will cause additional damage of the carrier's critical hit damage 40%. When releasing all skills to attack, it will cause additional damage of the carrier's critical hit damage 15%.
